hints.text: Naglfar — the ghost ship of Norse legend, built from the fingernails of the dead. It hunts wrecks, not sailors. It cannot be destroyed.
Let it do what it came to do.
Naglfar takes wrecks back to the deep — opening new paths, or destroying the defenses you were counting on.
The dead belong to it. Your battle is with the living.
Naglfar does not care about friend or foe. It follows its own course through the ruins of battle.
Do not stand in its way.
